hooks.prompt: A coding session is ending. Apply the engineering-insights skill to capture learnings before stopping: (1) identify which module(s) were touched — server/, client/, reviewer-core/, e2e/, or the repo root for cross-cutting facts; (2) READ that module's insights.md; (3) if this session produced a substantive, NON-OBVIOUS learning that is NOT already recorded there, append it under the correct one of the 7 sections (dedup first; substantive-only; append-only; datestamp Session Notes entries). If nothing qualifies, change nothing. Only ever APPEND to the module's insights.md using Edit — never overwrite it, and never modify any other file (especially other skills, settings, hooks, or source). Return 'approve' to allow stopping, or 'block' with a one-line reason naming the single learning still worth capturing.
